_comment: Odoo 18 differentiation from odoo-17 base: search(domain=...) keyword (was search(args=...)), aggregator='sum' field attr (was group_operator=), unified check_access(operation), <list> view tag preferred over <tree>, name_get() deprecated → _compute_display_name(). Reuses odoo-17 rule pack since deltas are additive-not-breaking for review purposes. See templates/cursor/skills/odoo/odoo-code-patterns/references/odoo-18-patterns.md for full delta list.
description: Odoo 18 Community / Enterprise — Python 3.10+, OWL, search(domain=...), <list> view tag, unified check_access(). Reuses odoo-17 rule pack — see odoo-18-patterns.md for deltas.

stack._doc: Per-stack optional path overrides — used by realdata_test MCP. Leave empty to let user set <PREFIX>_ODOO_BIN / <PREFIX>_ODOO_CONF env vars at runtime.

_rules_comment: TODO: differentiate from odoo-17 base when templates/cursor/rules/odoo-18/ is authored. v18 deltas (search keyword, aggregator, check_access) covered in skill references only.
